name: alert
summary: An alert box that displays a notification message to the user. 8 documented props. 2 variant groups. Depends on @radix-ui/react-slot, cva, react. 9 examples.
guidance: An alert box that displays a notification message to the user.

primary_props.name: after
primary_props.description: The slot to be rendered after the description. This can be a string, number or any valid React element. If omitted, it will not be displayed. // Display an alert with button <Alert after={<Button size='sm'>Save</Button>} />

primary_props.name: before
primary_props.description: The slot to be rendered before the description. This can be used to render an icon or any other element before the description. Also accepts a string, number, or any valid React element. If the `before` prop is omitted, the default icon will be displayed. // Display an alert with icon <Alert before={<SuccessIcon />} />

primary_props.name: children
primary_props.default_value: "This is an alert description with helpful information."
primary_props.description: Used as a secondary text.

primary_props.name: closable
primary_props.description: Is the alert closable? If true, a close button will be displayed and when clicked on it will hide the alert element.
